He won the Outstanding Innovation Award at Super AI Engineer Season 5 and serves as Head of Operations at BU ROBOTSTUDIO."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What are Natthanarong Tiangjit's main skills?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Natthanarong Tiangjit's main skills include Python programming, Machine Learning, LLM Optimization, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) Chatbots, Full-Stack Web Development with Next.js and Django, Robotics, PLC Programming, Computer Vision, and Docker containerization.
